action.reasoning: Observation: iter_23 eval failed because predict.py expects W shape (128, 124) but the full-data linear model saved by fit_full_linear.py has W shape (124, 128) (scipy solution output). The matmul W.T failed. Analysis: Inconsistency between manual Ridge solution (W 124×128) and earlier sklearn Ridge (W 128×124). Fixing predict.py to handle both shapes will unblock eval. The full-data linear model likely yields score around 0.28–0.30, close to our best. Decision: update predict.py to detect W shape and multiply correctly (no transpose if W is 124×128). Then submit eval with the fixed script to measure full-data linear model performance. No retraining needed; fix is fast.
